prose: The frontier orbital calculation for water was completed using Density Functional Theory (DFT) at the B3LYP/def2-TZVP level of theory (tier 'standard') in the gas phase, as requested. The calculation was performed on the user-provided geometry, assuming a neutral charge (0) and a singlet multiplicity (1). The calculation was run using the PySCF backend. The predicted HOMO energy is -8.6037 eV and the LUMO energy is 0.3370 eV, giving a HOMO-LUMO gap of 8.9407 eV. No warnings were reported by the engine.
